name: Johnny
description: Prompt compression via local Ollama model — compresses verbose text into minimal shorthand tokens, saving API input costs. Named after Johnny Mnemonic.

autoCompress.label: Auto-Compress
autoCompress.help: Automatically compress user messages before sending to the LLM.

minTokenThreshold.label: Min Token Threshold
minTokenThreshold.help: Skip compression for messages with fewer estimated tokens than this.

ollamaBaseUrl.label: Ollama Base URL
ollamaBaseUrl.help: Ollama HTTP API base URL. Auto-resolves to host.docker.internal when running in Docker.

model.label: Ollama Model
model.help: Ollama model name for prompt compression (create with: ollama create johnny -f Modelfile).
